rag_rules: Fix type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with expression types; use int, real, or bool as appropriate
Resolve undefined references by ensuring all identifiers are visible or declared in the same annex
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers
Component type annexes should avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths
Type consistency is required for all AGREE expressions and declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq for helper declarations and gua for guarantees
Scalar types in AGREE are int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not reference undefined identifiers or use invalid scalar type names in AGREE contracts
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
